creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The port uses a fake config screen which predates OPTIONS processing so 
the port needs to be reconfigured each time it's built which explains 
why `make config` does not work. 

As for the build failure, I was able to build the port using the default 
options without any problem.  Can you tell me what options you changed 
in the port and provide your make.conf?
